data_coverage_summary: MachineMetrics REST and GraphQL APIs has public documentation that indicates production operations and equipment context across machines, production jobs, events, measurements. Public developer portal and API documentation are available.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface when the integration needs a mix of manufacturing asset context, operational readings, and downstream workflow updates. Machinemetrics should be treated as a rest / graphql api surface for production operations and equipment context.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for MachineMetrics REST and GraphQL APIs indicates Public developer portal and API documentation are available. available_data.description: The public documentation positions this surface around plant-floor execution, equipment context, and production workflow data used by manufacturing operations teams.

Operational measurements, events, or status signals

ingest_considerations: The public source for MachineMetrics REST and GraphQL APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as production operations and equipment context, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
